name: sat_359bp_subvariant_356bp
description: Drosophila simple satellite block: 356-bp sub-variant of the 1.688 satellite family — X pericentric. The 1.688 g/cc satellite family is a heterogeneous cluster of 260-359 bp AT-rich repeats. Sub-variants share 60-80% identity and historically formed multiple cytogenetic bands within X heterochromatin.
